description: Hellbanianz is an organised street gang based in the Gascoigne Estate in Barking, London. It is involved in drug trafficking and armed robbery, with ties to the Albanian mafia. The gang gained notoriety for flaunting wealth and firearms on social media, and has been linked to several high-profile criminal cases. Its most prominent member, Tristen Asllani, was sentenced to 25 years in prison in 2016.
